mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_report(reporter_id, post_id, reason_type, reason_desc, status) VALUES(#{reporterId}, #{postId}, #{reasonType}, #{reasonDesc}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id AS id, reporter_id AS reporterId, post_id AS postId, reason_type AS reasonType, reason_desc AS reasonDesc, status AS status, admin_remark AS adminRemark, handled_by AS handledBy, created_at AS createdAt, handled_at AS handledAt FROM post_report WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM post_report WHERE post_id = #{postId} AND status = 0

SELECT r.id AS id, r.reporter_id AS reporterId, r.post_id AS postId, r.reason_type AS reasonType, r.reason_desc AS reasonDesc, r.status AS status, r.admin_remark AS adminRemark, r.handled_by AS handledBy, r.created_at AS createdAt, r.handled_at AS handledAt, u.nickname AS reporterNickname, p.title AS postTitle, p.description AS postDescription, p.status AS postStatus, a.username AS handledAdminName FROM post_report r LEFT JOIN user u ON u.id = r.reporter_id LEFT JOIN post p ON p.id = r.post_id LEFT JOIN admin a ON a.id = r.handled_by WHERE r.post_id = #{postId} AND r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE post_report SET status = #{status}, admin_remark = #{adminRemark}, handled_by = #{adminId}, handled_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
